goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 0' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'east'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 09:00' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should depart from 'leicester' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 0 and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the east
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 4
Make sure you get price range
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 09:00 and should leave on sunday
The train should depart from leicester and should go to cambridge
